stemHtml: When the speed is above the speed for flap extension, the flap load relief system…

options.a: reduces speed due to the parasite drag from extension of the spoilers.
options.b: prevents the flaps from being extended when the speed is too high.
options.c: locks movement of the flap lever towards the extended direction.
options.d: blocks trailing-edge flap movement if an asymmetry or misalignment is detected.
